mapper.insert: INSERT INTO image(user_id, url, local_url, md5, width, height, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{url}, #{localUrl}, #{md5}, #{width}, #{height}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM image WHERE md5 = #{md5} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM image WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT i.* FROM image i INNER JOIN image_tag it ON i.id = it.image_id INNER JOIN tag t ON it.tag_id = t.id WHERE t.name = #{tag} ORDER BY i.create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM image ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT DISTINCT t.name FROM tag t INNER JOIN image_tag it ON t.id = it.tag_id ORDER BY t.name ASC
SELECT t.name FROM tag t INNER JOIN image_tag it ON t.id = it.tag_id WHERE it.image_id = #{imageId} ORDER BY t.name ASC
SELECT id FROM tag WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
